title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce token costs, and extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, media generation, and model switching. Featured tools include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, and Morph among others, with emphasis on practical cost savings and productivity gains.
